description_long: This object is a round, golden-brown baked good with a slightly domed top and a rough, uneven surface. Scattered across its surface are several visible chocolate chips, some partially embedded and others protruding slightly, giving it a classic homemade appearance. The edges are slightly irregular, with a gentle rise and a few minor cracks, suggesting a soft, tender interior. The coloration ranges from a light tan to a deeper golden brown, especially around the edges, indicating a well-baked exterior. There is no visible frosting, wrapper, or decorative elements present. The object is shown isolated against a plain white background, with no visible support or placement context.
description: A round, golden-brown muffin with visible chocolate chips and a slightly rough, homemade texture. No frosting, wrapper, or decorations are present.
description_view_0: This view shows the muffin's slightly domed top with several chocolate chips visible and a golden-brown, uneven surface.
description_view_1: The muffin appears flatter from this angle, with fewer chocolate chips visible and a more pronounced edge.
description_view_2: This side highlights a smoother, less textured surface with only a couple of chocolate chips showing.
description_view_3: The muffin's top is more evenly colored here, with several chocolate chips visible and a gently rounded edge.
